channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Peni Parker has been revealed as the newest character for Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls
item.content:encoded:
ARC System Works has announced the latest reveal for the Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls roster, and that character is Peni Parker. She is also the fourth member of the Amazing Guardians team which the other three members being Spider-Man, Star Lord, and Ms Marvel. The voice actors for these four characters have also been confirmed with Josh Keaton as Spider-Man, Dalia Rooni as Ms Marvel, Scott Porter as Star Lord, and Risa Mei as Peni Parker.

The reveal trailer of the Amazing Guardians shows the team members partnering up to take on other characters, including crossover moves. Peni will be piloting SP//dr using different tools and gadgets to win the fights. The trailer also gives us a bit more of Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls lore, bringing one of the Elders of the Universe The Promotor, aka Xirena Awhina. It seems The Promotor has organised this tournament between Earth’s prominent fighters to determine the fate of Earth.

Team names will play a part in Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls, with Amazing Guardians being one of them. The game will feature automatic team name generation that will take into account the characters chosen and Marvel lore. All the names will be on the screen and announced by the ring announcer. The next public demo, which will feature Peni Parker, will be hosted at EVO Japan 2026 which will be in Tokyo from May 1st to 3rd.

Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls will launch on 6th August 2026 for PS5 and PC.

Source: PlayStation.Blog



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/03/22/peni-parker-has-been-revealed-as-the-newest-character-for-marvel-tokon-fighting-souls/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Digimon Up is a new mobile game in which you raise Digimon
item.content:encoded:
Bandai Namco has lifted the lid on a brand new Digimon mobile game called Digimon Up, a game in which you will raise partner Digimon and battle them. The game will also feature Digimon cards and Digivices too, though how these will all come together has not yet been detailed. Digimon Up will feature brand new sprite pixel art too, giving a fresh look for the Digimon.

Digimon Up is set to release this year. In addition to the reveal of Digimon Up, Bandai Namco also announced that Digimon Story Time Stranger will be getting a new expansion in 2027, which is currently in development but there have been no further details about what it will contain. In our Digimon Story Time Stranger review, Jason said, “I really, really like Digimon Story Time Stranger. While it’s hardly upending the monster collection and battling genre, it’s a really comfortable and enjoyable game that feels reminiscent of watching Saturday morning cartoons as a kid. It’s an awful lot of fun, and is right up there as one of my favourite games of the year.”

Source: YouTube



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/03/22/digimon-up-is-a-new-mobile-game-in-which-you-raise-digimon/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Minecraft Dungeons II brings more action RPG battling later this year
item.content:encoded:
A big announcement at Minecraft Live this year, Mojang and development partner Double Eleven have announced that Minecraft Dungeons II is coming later in 2026. In the works for Xbox Series X|S, PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch and Switch 2, and PC, it will naturally be launching day one into some parts of Xbox Game Pass.

The trailer blurb reads:

A hero’s work is never done! Disorder is brewing, and the world stands before a threat unlike any other. A new danger is growing in power, ready to descend upon the land and unleash mayhem.

Return to the world of Minecraft Dungeons in an all new action RPG adventure, brimming with high stakes encounters, thrilling challenges, and never before seen locations, as you set out to save a world in crisis. Will you and your allies prevail against the forces of evil and save the day once more?

There’s already a few little hints of the game’s story within the trailer, as you can see the hub area from the first game is now burning and the Ancient City portal is functional, but aside from that, it’s just a slickly rendered announcement trailer.

What’s more important is to see how Minecraft Dungeons 2 looks to expand and improve on the first game. The original launched in the middle of 2020, putting a new twist on the blocky Minecraft universe by blending it with the dungeon crawling of Diablo. It’s fair to say that it didn’t really feature much of the crafting and creativity of the main Minecraft game, so perhaps more of those elements could be integrated? Either way, the action RPG battling and loot gathering is always a good time, especially with friends and family.

In our Minecraft Dungeons review, Dom wrote, “Minecraft Dungeons could easily have been “My First Dungeon Crawler”, but it’s so much more than that. It does a great job of taking the genre’s hooks – the waves of enemies, the pervasive drive for better loot – and makes them palatable and approachable for a wide-ranging audience. It’s perfect family gaming, but if you crank the difficulty up prepare for an epic beatdown, and the epic rewards to go with them.”

Source: Minecraft



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/03/21/minecraft-dungeons-ii-brings-more-action-rpg-battling-later-this-year/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
